_readme: Webhook tool config for the Caller agent. ElevenLabs dashboard: Agent > Tools > Add tool > Webhook. Replace {PUBLIC_BASE_URL} with the ngrok URL (no trailing slash).
name: end_call_outcome
description: MANDATORY at the end of EVERY call, exactly once, before saying goodbye. Records the structured outcome. 'quote' requires every figure already logged via log_quote; 'callback_commitment' requires a named day and time in detail; 'documented_decline' requires the refusal reason in detail.

request_body_schema.description: The one structured outcome this call ends in.

call_id.description: The call reference from the system prompt ({{call_id}})

detail.description: callback_commitment: the named day+time and who to ask for, verbatim. documented_decline: their reason, verbatim. quote: optional summary, e.g. which university the quote routes to.
